title: oplismenus compositus
intro: Oplismenus compositus, also known as Jointed Wood-rush or Jointed Hair-grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Oplismenus compositus include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
